# Soft24 Handoff26 Hard56 Contract

## Soft 24
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.24 with quality bias floor 0.22 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 26
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.26 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Hard 56
hard block defaults to 0.56 with absolute trigger 40k and floored ratio thresholds for denser long-horizon reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/usage vitest
